---
title: bool-literal-in-expr
description: "Remove boolean literals from logical comparisons."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Remove boolean literals from logical comparisons. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if ready == true { start() }
```

## Good

```go
if ready { start() }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only bool-literal-in-expr`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
